message:
test(mux): add layout cycle, preset, and split-size tests (ft-1memj.29 prep)

Add 15 focused tests for swap layout data structures:
- LayoutCycle: select, advance/prev roundtrip, single-layout edge case
- Built-in presets: slot counts, main slot detection, serialization roundtrip
- compute_split_sizes: tiny terminal, DPI preservation, asymmetric ratio, clamping
- LayoutArrangement: nested slot counting, no-main-slot detection, main_bottom structure

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
